## Summary

<What this change does, in one or two sentences.>

## Which part it touches

<An axis (order, breadth, depth, time), a wall (boundary, stop, verify, approval),
the planner, the executor, the worker, the CLI, or the docs.>

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass: `python -m unittest discover -s tests`
- [ ] The demo still runs: `python -m tesseract_pipeline demo`
- [ ] The ontology is preserved (four axes, single sweep, the box), or the change to
      it is justified above.
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies (or justified in the description).
